news.headline: Malaysia’s king to pick ‘best candidate’ to head anti-corruption agency
news.summary:
Malaysia’s king said he would select a new anti-corruption chief, the first official confirmation that current head Azam Baki’s term will not be renewed when it ends next month.

news.headline: Number of billionaires globally could reach 4,000 in next five years
